content:
Do not modify any code.

Only reset the Expo preview/runtime environment and make sure the phone QR points to the latest session.

Do exactly this:
1. Stop the current Expo/preview process completely
2. Clear Expo/Metro cache
3. Start Expo again with clean cache
4. Regenerate a fresh QR code
5. Confirm the new session is using the latest codebase
6. Do not reimplement features
7. Do not refactor anything

After that, tell me:
- whether the Expo environment restarted successfully
- whether the QR code is fresh
- whether the latest code is now reflected in preview
